judgeReasoning: The response clearly distinguishes that llms.txt is a website/HTTP convention unsuitable for a tarball (no server, no HTTP fetching), while AGENTS.md is the correct filesystem entry point with relative links to offline docs. It explicitly enumerates the website-only artifacts skipped by --bundle, including llms.txt, llms-full.txt, search index, sitemap, and robots. All rubric-required points are satisfied without error.
